title: Learn should turn a term correction into language memory
why_this_case_exists: This is the most basic learn success case: a reviewer fixes a recurring term, and the tool should save that preference as reusable memory.
setup: The repository is a Git repo.
The target file already exists in HEAD and is modified in the working tree.
The source block still clearly refers to the same recurring product concept.

input.before_translation: Use the knowledge base to manage docs.
input.after_translation: Use the Wiki to manage docs.

expected: The rule is written to the English language memory, under terminology or an equivalent section.
The new rule is specific, for example: Translate "知识库" as "Wiki".
should_not_happen: The tool only writes vague filler such as Keep terminology consistent.
The rule is written to playbook.md instead of the English memory.
